title: rumohra henryi
intro: Rumohra henryi, also known as the Henry's leathery fern or leathery fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rumohra henryi are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used topically as a paste or poultice in various herbal preparations.
